_comment: Slack App manifest for RCC (Rocky Command Center). Import at https://api.slack.com/apps

display_information.name: Rocky Command Center
display_information.description: RCC agent coordination hub — ask Rocky questions, check queue status, and route work.
display_information.long_description: Rocky Command Center (RCC) is the coordination hub for the Rocky & Friends agent team. Use @Rocky to ask questions, get queue status, and route work items. Supports slash commands and direct messages.

slash_commands.description: Rocky Command Center — queue, status, and AI queries
